title: Nairobi National Park
description: Skyline safari minutes from the CBD — lions, rhinos, and giraffes with budget shared van tours.
highlights:
City skyline safari
Black rhino
Budget shared tours
Half-day trip
directions: Meet shared tour vans at KWS headquarters or arrange pick-up; matatu to gate possible with taxi last mile.
public_transport: Taxi/boda to gate KES 500; shared van tour KES 3,500 pp typical.
road_conditions: Good tarmac to gate; park tracks dusty.
safety_and_conditions: Do not exit vehicle except at designated areas. Early entry beats traffic.
travel_tips: Join 6am shared van to split costs — book via hostel or Facebook groups.

title: Lake Nakuru National Park
description: Compact park famous for rhinos, flamingos, and escarpment viewpoints — ideal budget day safari from Nairobi.
best_time_to_visit: Year-round rhinos; birds best after rains
highlights:
Rhino sanctuary
Flamingo shores
Compact drives
Day trip friendly
directions: Bus/matatu to Nakuru, join shared safari van or rent taxi for park loop.
public_transport: Bus KES 400–600; shared van KES 3,000 pp.
road_conditions: Tarmac to Nakuru; park roads good.
safety_and_conditions: Baboons at picnic sites — lock vehicles.
travel_tips: Flamingo numbers vary with water — rhinos reliable year-round.

title: Amboseli National Park
description: Elephant herds beneath Kilimanjaro on a budget shared day trip from Nairobi.
highlights:
Elephant herds
Kilimanjaro views
Wetland birds
Shared van day trips
directions: Budget operators run shared vans from Nairobi CBD overnight or 5am departure.
public_transport: Shared van day trip KES 5,500–8,000 pp from Nairobi incl. park fee.
road_conditions: Mombasa Road then Emali turnoff; park roads dusty.
safety_and_conditions: Strong sun — hat and water. Stay in vehicle except viewpoints.
what_to_carry: Sun protection, binoculars, cash for tips.
travel_tips: Clear mornings best for Kilimanjaro photos — Jun–Oct.

title: Tsavo East National Park
description: Vast red-earth wilderness on the Nairobi–Mombasa corridor — budget camping and self-drive options.
highlights:
Red elephants
Vast wilderness
SGR access via Voi
Budget camps
directions: SGR to Voi or bus Nairobi–Mombasa drop Voi; hire taxi to Manyani or Voi gate.
public_transport: SGR Voi KES 1,000; taxi to gate KES 1,500 shared.
road_conditions: Murram park roads; 4x4 helpful in wet season.
safety_and_conditions: Large park — plan fuel and water. Wildlife on roads.
what_to_carry: Self-drive papers, water, camping gear if staying.
travel_tips: Aruba Dam area good for dry-season elephant viewing.
safari_tips: Enter via Voi if coming by SGR

title: Haller Park
description: Former quarry turned wildlife sanctuary in Mombasa — feeding walks and budget family afternoon.
highlights:
Hippo feeding
City sanctuary
Cycling paths
Family budget
directions: SGR to Mombasa Terminus, matatu/tuk-tuk to Bamburi Haller Park.
safety_and_conditions: Follow ranger times for hippo/croc feeding.
travel_tips: 4pm feeding session most popular — arrive early.

title: Crescent Island
description: Walk among zebras and giraffes on a private island in Lake Naivasha — budget boat plus park fee.
highlights:
Walking safari
Boat ride
Giraffe close-ups
Half-day trip
directions: Matatu to Naivasha, boat from waterfront to island — negotiate at jetty.
road_conditions: Lake calm mornings best for boats.
safety_and_conditions: Walk only on designated paths; animals wild.
travel_tips: Combine with Hell's Gate same weekend.

title: Shimba Hills National Reserve
description: Coastal rainforest reserve with sable antelope and elephants — budget day trip from Mombasa/Diani.
highlights:
Sable antelope
Coastal forest
Sheldrick Falls hike
Budget day safari
directions: Bus from Mombasa to Kwale, taxi to gate; or matatu from Diani area.
travel_tips: Sheldrick Falls trail inside park same ticket day.
safari_tips: Start early for elephant on roads

title: Saiwa Swamp National Park
description: Tiny park home to the endangered sitatunga — budget birding and boardwalks in western Kenya.
highlights:
Sitatunga antelope
Boardwalks
Birding
Low park fees
directions: Bus to Kitale, boda/matatu to Saiwa gate.
travel_tips: Dawn best for sitatunga on swamp edge.

title: Lake Bogoria Flamingos
description: Geothermal lake with flamingo flocks and hot springs — budget day from Nakuru.
highlights:
Flamingo flocks
Hot springs
Geothermal steam
Budget day trip
directions: Matatu Nakuru–Kabarnet route drop Marigat, boda to Loboi gate.
safety_and_conditions: Hot springs extremely hot — caution. Stay in vehicle near cliffs.
travel_tips: Morning light for pink shoreline photos.

title: Maasai Mara — Budget Gate
description: Iconic Mara wildlife on a budget camping safari — shared vans and public access via Narok.
highlights:
Big cats
Migration season
Budget camps
Shared safaris
directions: Matatu/bus Nairobi–Narok–Talek/Sekenani gate; join budget camp safari package.
public_transport: Bus to Narok KES 500–800; shared safari van KES 5,000/day pp.
road_conditions: Murram in reserve; 4x4 needed in wet season.
safety_and_conditions: Migration crowds Jul–Aug — book camps early. Respect Maasai land fees.
what_to_carry: Warm layers, binoculars, cash for tips.
travel_tips: Budget 3-day/2-night packages from Narok town start ~KES 18,000 pp.
